items.note:
[Backend] Workload sync should retry on failure
Context: the nightly capacity sync sometimes leaves a team with no numbers.
Impact: managers open the map to an empty state and lose trust in it.
Suggestion: retry the sync a few times before giving up, and show the last-good data meanwhile.
items.triageNote: Sync reliability is core to Real Data Go-live. Correctly placed.

items.note:
[Bug] Export button does nothing on the weekly report
Context: clicking Export gives no file and no error.
Impact: I can't share the week with my director.
Suggestion: it should download a PDF or show why it can't.
items.triageNote: Real defect (dead export button), not a nice-to-have. Assigned to Wave 1 (reporting) to fix now.

items.note:
[Feature] Dark mode for the printed report
Context: the report is bright white when printed at night.
Impact: minor, cosmetic.
Suggestion: a dark theme for the report page.
items.triageNote: Legitimate but low-value cosmetic idea. Acknowledged (Under review); not worth a wave yet, not discarded.
